# Innovation Campus

> Premium coworking spaces, private offices, meeting rooms, and event venues in Málaga (Spain), Ancona and Olbia (Italy). Flexible terms, outstanding service, international entrepreneurial community.

Innovation Campus is a boutique workspace operator for companies, startups, freelancers, and entrepreneurs who want more than a desk — a full professional environment with concierge-level service, a curated community, and prime locations in mid-size European cities.

---

## Who we are

Innovation Campus was founded to serve a growing class of mobile professionals and international businesses looking for inspiring, well-equipped workspaces outside the major European capitals. We operate in cities that combine high quality of life with a thriving startup and business ecosystem: Málaga, Ancona, and Olbia.

Our spaces are not generic co-working chains. Each location has a distinctive character — a restored historic palace in Málaga's old town, a bright sea-view building steps from the Mediterranean, a dedicated hub in the heart of Ancona, and an emerging innovation center in Olbia, Sardinia.

---

## Locations

### Málaga Palace — Historic Center, Málaga, Spain
Our flagship location inside a restored 19th-century palace in Málaga's historic center. Spread across 4 floors with a rooftop terrace, offering coworking, private offices, five meeting rooms, and event spaces for up to 80 people.
- Address: Centro Histórico, Málaga, Spain
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/malaga-palace
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/malaga-palace
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/malaga-palace

### Málaga Terrace — Seaside, Málaga, Spain
A modern workspace with panoramic sea views on the Málaga seafront. Coworking desks, private offices from 1 to 20 people, and a private rooftop terrace.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/malaga-terrace
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/malaga-terrace
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/malaga-terrace

### Innovation Campus Ancona — Ancona, Italy
Coworking, private offices, and meeting rooms in the center of Ancona, capital of the Marche region.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/ancona
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/ancona
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/ancona

### Innovation Campus Olbia — Olbia, Sardinia, Italy
Workspace and event spaces in Olbia, one of Sardinia's fastest-growing business hubs. Ideal for teams visiting Sardinia or companies with local presence.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/olbia
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/olbia
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/olbia

---

## Services & Products

### Coworking Space
Hot desks and dedicated desks available daily, weekly, and monthly. Access to shared amenities: reception service, high-speed WiFi, printing, coffee bar, and community events.
- Best for: freelancers, remote workers, digital nomads, visiting professionals
- Locations: Málaga Palace, Málaga Terrace, Ancona, Olbia
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/coworking-space
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/coworking
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/coworking

### Private Offices
Fully enclosed private office suites for teams of 1 to 20+ people. Available on flexible monthly rolling contracts with no long-term commitment. Includes reception, cleaning, smart keyless access, and multi-location access.
- Sizes available: small (1–3 people), medium (4–8 people), large (9–20 people)
- Locations: Málaga Palace, Málaga Terrace
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/private-offices
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/oficinas-privadas
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/uffici-privati

### Meeting Rooms
Five professional conference rooms at Málaga Palace, all equipped with 4K displays and video conferencing. Available for half-day or full-day hire.
- **Big Conference Room** — Up to 80 people. 85" 4K display, premium A/V system, flexible layout. Best for large team meetings, workshops, presentations.
- **Large Conference Room** — Up to 50 people. 55" 4K display, boardroom setup. Best for board meetings, client presentations.
- **Quarter Conference Room** — Up to 30 people. 43" display, intimate boardroom. Best for team meetings, interviews, small workshops.
- **Training Room** — Up to 40 people. 4K projector, classroom layout, whiteboards. Best for training sessions, courses, seminars.
- **Phone Booth** — 1–2 people. Soundproofed pod, video call ready. Best for private calls, focus work.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/meeting-rooms
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/salas-de-reuniones
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/sale-riunioni

### Event Venue Hire
Host corporate events, product launches, networking nights, workshops, conferences, and team retreats at our Málaga Palace location. Catering available. Capacity up to 80 people.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/host-your-event
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/organiza-tu-evento
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/organizza-evento

### Private Terrace
Exclusive rooftop terrace at Málaga Palace for outdoor events, cocktail receptions, and private meetings. Unique setting in Málaga's historic center.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/private-terrace
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/terraza-privada
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/terrazza-privata

### Business Registration
Register your company's legal address at Innovation Campus. Ideal for international companies establishing a presence in Spain or Italy without a physical office.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/business-registration
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/registro-de-empresas
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/registrazione-aziendale

### Academy
Training programs, workshops, and professional development courses for entrepreneurs and teams. Topics include business development, digital skills, leadership, and startup growth.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/academy
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/academia
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/academy

### Member Perks & Benefits
Exclusive discounts and perks for Innovation Campus members — from local businesses, travel, software, and professional services.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/benefits
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/beneficios
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/vantaggi

### Community Events
Regular networking events, talks, meetups, and social gatherings organized by and for the Innovation Campus community.
- EN: https://innovationcampus.biz/en/events
- ES: https://innovationcampus.biz/es/eventos
- IT: https://innovationcampus.biz/it/eventi

---

## Key differentiators

- **Location quality**: historic palace and seafront building in Málaga — not generic business parks
- **Flexible contracts**: monthly rolling terms, no long-term lock-in
- **Full-service**: reception, cleaning, 24/7 keyless access, app, multi-location access included
- **International community**: members from across Europe and beyond — startups, agencies, remote teams, entrepreneurs
- **Mid-size cities**: Málaga, Ancona, and Olbia offer quality of life that major capitals can't match, at competitive costs
- **Event capability**: one of Málaga's few coworking spaces that can host events for 80+ people

---

## Target audience

- **Freelancers & remote workers** looking for a professional environment in Spain or Italy
- **Startups & scale-ups** needing flexible private offices without long leases
- **International companies** establishing a Spanish or Italian presence (business registration + office)
- **Event organizers** looking for a unique venue in Málaga
- **Visiting teams** needing a temporary base for project work or client meetings
- **Local businesses** needing professional meeting rooms on demand

---

## Languages

This website is available in English, Spanish, and Italian. All service and location pages exist in all three languages with localized URLs.
